nodes.label: Threading Rule
nodes.rationale: sync_turn enqueues and returns immediately; non-daemon worker drains queue; shutdown posts sentinel and joins with timeout; worker logs WARNING on Cashew failure and continues.

nodes.label: No ~/.hermes writes
nodes.rationale: All paths scope under hermes_home; tests use tmp_path fixture.

nodes.label: Profile Isolation
nodes.rationale: Absolute paths in cashew_db_path are rejected to preserve profile isolation.

nodes.label: sync_turn <10 ms
nodes.rationale: Hot-path enqueue must return in under 10 ms.

nodes.label: HF_HUB_OFFLINE constraint
nodes.rationale: HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 etc. are process-wide; tests must never trigger the ~500 MB embedding model download.
